name: whatsapp-clone
description: A professional WhatsApp Web clone built with the MERN stack and real-time communication using Socket.io. This application features advanced AI capabilities like Voice-to-Text and Text-to-Speech, along with contextual Smart Replies.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
